title: Looking for monday.com Experts to Join our Herd! 🦙🦙🦙

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there - Mark here, the Founder and Lead Llama at Green Llamas Consulting, a Bronze monday.com Partner.

We are growing and actively looking for some fantastic monday.com freelance experts to assist with our growing herd of clientele.

We need strong, capable and confident individuals to join our team that can do it all in monday! Process Analysis, System Design & Development, Training, Documentation and Support. Additionally, being skilled in integration tools such as make.com or Zapier and/or have direct development knowledge with monday is a bonus.

Offering scalable hours, training and certification paths, competitive rates, remote working and flexible work schedules, you can enjoy working with what you love (monday.com that is) you own way.

If you are interested in learning more please fill out this form and we will get back to you with next steps.

Also, check us out online to learn more about what we do!

Green Llamas

Join the Herd | Green Llamas

Check out the current job openings at Green Llamas and come join our herd!

Thanks all!
Mark
